title: The Zap Gun
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A 1967 satirical novel about weapons designers on both sides of the Cold War who channel designs through mediumistic trances, producing weapons that are secretly converted into consumer products. When a real alien threat appears, the sham weapons are useless. A dark comedy about the military-industrial complex. 209 pages.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip Kindred - The Zap Gun - libgen.li.pdf
